notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by catcher Drew Romo on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Drew Romo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Romo grounds into a double play, second baseman Matt Shaw to shortstop Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Tristan Peters out at 2nd. Drew Romo out at 1st.
